race.comment: Typical maiden hurdle with a few bringing some handy flat form into what is their jumps debut. MORRYL MORAL (6) is in that category and a mark of his talent is that he started $6 in a BM70 in town last time out. Beaten a long way that day, but so was everything else and he's won a hurdle trial since. Pateman riding might be the biggest push of all. Stablemate FLAMIN' ROMANS (1), is also having his first jumps start and it was less than three months ago he was beaten in the Listed Torney Cup on the flat. Has had two hurdle trials since his latest run, winning one and finishing third in the other. ZINOVATION (10) quickly gets to the jumps, having had just 10 starts, but looks a stayer and was a strong maiden winner last time. SHAMARKAND (8) will find this easier than last start and placed over the jumps three back.
